visual_mood: Magazine-style beach moment -- golden hour, person wearing Dubery shades, aspirational but real

layout.composition: Full-bleed lifestyle photo. Person in lower 2/3 wearing sunglasses. Headline text in upper third, positioned against the sky for legibility. Logo bottom-right.
layout.text_hierarchy: Headline large, tagline small, logo small
layout.background: Golden hour beach scene, warm tones

product.placement: Worn on face naturally -- frames sit on bridge of nose and ears, catching golden hour light
product.instruction: The sunglasses should look like a real pair photographed in this scene -- matching the style shown in the reference image. Not a digital composite or 3D render.

brand.color_scheme: Warm golden hour tones throughout, white text for contrast against sky, subtle warm color grading

prompt: A golden hour beach photograph in the Philippines, warm sunlight painting everything amber. A Filipino male in his late 20s wearing Bandits Green sunglasses from DuberyMNL walks along the shoreline -- real glossy sunglasses matching the reference image, catching golden light naturally, not a composite. All text uses the bold italic sporty typeface from the font reference. Large white headline 'MADE FOR DAYS LIKE THIS' in the upper portion against the sky, small subtitle 'DUBERY POLARIZED' below. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, magazine ad quality.
